name: Backyard Golf Simulator
about: Backyard Golf Simulator offers custom-built golf simulator cabins designed for year-round play regardless of weather conditions. The company provides complete packages including Eagle, Birdie, and Par sizes, each equipped with GC3 launch monitors, FSX Play accounts with 20 courses, projectors, hitting screens, and climate-controlled environments. Cabins are delivered fully assembled with professional on-site setup, requiring only a standard 110V outlet to begin play. Pricing varies by package size and shipping distance based on a $9 per mile rate from their facility in Miami County, Ohio.
why_golfers_like_it: Complete privacy and ownership of the golf simulator space
All-inclusive packages with no additional equipment required
Professional on-site setup and calibration service
Year-round play regardless of weather conditions
Customizable cabin dimensions and interior finishes

food_and_drink.notes: Eagle Package includes refrigerator, bar, and tables for entertaining
Eagle Package includes bar, suitable for BYOB setup

simulator_hardware.notes: Included in all packages with infrared technology

faq.question: Do I need to provide my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, all packages include equipment with ball and club caddies, though you may use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the Eagle Package includes a bar and refrigerator for entertaining, making it suitable for BYOB setups.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Complete setup and calibration is done on delivery day, allowing immediate play; 18-hole duration depends on software used.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Not specifically marketed for children; designed as private golf retreats for adults with packages accommodating up to 6 people.
